---
title: "NWSL Official Kickoff Times and Streaming Locations"
---

### Saturday, March 14

|**Home**|**Away**|**Announced/Actual Kickoff Time**|**Stream**|
|--------|---------|----------------------|---------|
| Boston | NJ/NY | 12:30/**12:37 PM ET** | ABC, ESPN app, Disney+ |
| Kansas City |Utah| 4:00/**4:07 PM ET** | ION|
| Bay | Denver| 6:30/**6:37 PM ET** | ION|
| North Carolina | Louisville | 7:00/**7:07 PM ET** | NWSL+|
| San Diego| Houston| 8:45/**8:52 PM ET**|ION|

: {tbl-colwidths="[66,66,80,80]"}

### Sunday, March 15

|**Home**|**Away**|**Announced/Actual Kickoff Time**|**Stream**|
|--------|---------|----------------------|---------|
| Orlando | Seattle | 4:00/**4:37 PM ET** | Victory+ |
| Angel City |Chicago| 7:00/**7:07 PM ET** | Victory+|

: {tbl-colwidths="[66,66,80,80]"}

### Friday, March 20

|**Home**|**Away**|**Announced/Actual Kickoff Time**|**Stream**|
|--------|---------|----------------------|---------|
| Orlando | Denver | 8:00/**8:07 PM ET** | Victory+ |
| Louisville |Washington| 8:00/**8:07 PM ET** | Victory+|
| Portland |Seattle| 10:00/**10:07 PM ET** | Prime Video|

: {tbl-colwidths="[66,66,80,80]"}

### Saturday, March 21

|**Home**|**Away**|**Announced/Actual Kickoff Time**|**Stream**|
|--------|---------|----------------------|---------|
| Houston | Boston | 4:00/**4:07 PM ET** | ION |
| NJ/NY |North Carolina| 6:30/**6:37 PM ET** | ION|
| Bay |Angel City| 8:45/**8:52 PM ET** | ION|

: {tbl-colwidths="[66,66,80,80]"}

### Sunday, March 22

|**Home**|**Away**|**Announced/Actual Kickoff Time**|**Stream**|
|--------|---------|----------------------|---------|
| Chicago | Kansas City | 2:00/**2:07 PM ET** | ESPN2, ESPN app |
| Utah Royals |san Diego| 7:00/**7:07 PM ET** | Victory+|


: {tbl-colwidths="[66,66,80,80]"}

<br><br><br><br><br><br> [Website inspired by: <https://mlskickofftimes.com/>]{style="font-size:.5;"}.
